data.name: tableLayoutPanel2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnBuzzerOff" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSignIn" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="pnlShowName" Row="0" RowSpan="3" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labTime" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label3" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labPowerMode" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblVersionValue" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labVersion" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labTimes" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,20,Percent,40,Percent,40" /><Rows Styles="Percent,33.33333,Percent,33.33333,Percent,33.33333" /></TableLayoutSettings>
